_comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the repo-wide version markers that must ALL equal /version. Read by BOTH scripts/bump-version.sh (--check drift guard) and 23-ai-workforce-blueprint/scripts/qc-assert-repo-consistency.py (VERSION-MARKERS dimension) so the two can never disagree on WHICH markers, or HOW MANY, track the repo version. To add or remove a marker, edit THIS file (and mirror the same change in bump-version.sh's roll logic + BUMP_CHECKED_MARKERS); bump-version.sh fails loudly at startup if its checked-marker count ever diverges from this manifest's count. Paths are relative to the repo root. Only markers that track /version in LOCKSTEP belong here; markers that track an INDEPENDENT skill version (e.g. other skills' SKILL.md version:, or per-skill skill-version.txt files) are deliberately excluded.
